ota.summary:
## What's Changed
* Bump esphome/workflows from 2024.11.1 to 2024.11.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/37
* Bump esphome/workflows from 2024.11.3 to 2024.12.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/40
* Bump esphome/workflows from 2024.12.0 to 2025.1.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/55
* define esp-idf version to 4.4.8  by @BigBobbas in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/46
* [CI] Bump ESPHome version used for builds by @kbx81 in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/64
* [S3-Box-3] Use new media player to support announcements by @kahrendt in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/61
* [S3-Box-Lite] Use new media player to support announcements by @kahrendt in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/62
* [S3-Box] Use new media player to support announcements by @kahrendt in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/63
* [M5 Echo] Use new media player to support announcements by @kahrendt in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/60
* [esp32-s3-box-3] Remove idf version overrides by @jesserockz in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/67
* Set min volume on media player for s3-boxes by @jesserockz in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/68

## New Contributors
* @kbx81 made their first contribution in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/64
* @kahrendt made their first contribution in https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/pull/61

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/esphome/wake-word-voice-assistants/compare/24.11.1...25.2.1
